ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "sub_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was submitted */,
  "tot_score" INTEGER /* Total score achieved in the game */,
  "barbarian_at_atm" INTEGER /* Score for the 'Barbarian at ATM' challenge */,
  "builders_at_construction_site" INTEGER /* Score for the 'Builders at Construction Site' challenge */,
  "calculate_triangles" INTEGER /* Score for the 'Calculate Triangles' challenge */,
  "cool_and_jd" INTEGER /* Score for the 'Cool and JD' challenge */,
  "pekka_in_maze" INTEGER /* Score for the 'Pekka in Maze' challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the score */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game version played */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Device used to play the game */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Operating system used to play the game */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., single-player, multi-player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_scores_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, developer, analyst) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score achievable in the challenge */,
  "challenge_type" TEXT /* Type of challenge (e.g., puzzle, racing) */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of leaderboard (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was achieved */,
  "progress_type" TEXT /* Type of progress (e.g., level completion, score achievement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "preference_category" TEXT /* Category of the preference (e.g., game settings, notification preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the game version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the game version */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date the version was installed by the user */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_versions_version_name FOREIGN KEY ("version_name") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_name")
)
